titleStmt.title: SII 5.723: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 723. (A.R. No. 159 of 1895). ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaka
ḷ polap peruni
lac celviyu n=ta
ṉakke Urimai
pūṇṭamai maṉa
kkoḷak kān=ta ḷū
rccālai kalamaṟu
ttaruḷi veṅ
kai ñāṭuṅ kaṅ
kapāṭiyum taṭi
kaipāṭiyuṅ nu
ḷampapāṭiyum
kuṭamalaināṭuṅ
kollamuṅ ka
liṅkamum tiṇ
ṭiṟal veṉṟi
ttaṇṭārk ko
ṇṭu taṉṉeḻi
l vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ
ḷellā yāṇṭu
m toḻutaka viḷaṅ
ku yāṇṭey ceḻi
yarait tecukoḷ
śrīkovirājarājarā
jakesaripanma kku yā
ṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu
teṉkarait ti
raimūrṉā
ṭṭu brabhmade yam
mahendra maṅkala
ttu sahai yo
m viṟṟuk kuṭutta
nilavilaiyāva
ṇam tālapaṭ
ṭolai Eḻutiṉa
cen=ta maṅkalamuṭai
yāṉukkāyk kiḻk
kaṇakkeḻutiṉa mu
ḻaiyūruṭaiyāṉ Aṭṭā
ṉaṉ namaccivāyat
taik koḷḷap pe
rumāṉaṭikaḷ Aruḷic
ceyta kācukkut taṅka
ḷūr Ivaṉ kāṇi Uḷḷa
tu kuṭiyoṭu kuṭiperu
m vilaikku Aṭaikut
tit tālattu vaiy
kka veṉṟu Uṭaiyār
paṭai koṅkavāḷā
rai viṭai yiṭṭu kkaṭai
yiṭuṅ kuṭuttu Irājarā
jamārāyar varakkāṭṭa
Ivaṉ kāṇi Aṭaikut
tip potuka veṉṟu
van=ta paṭaiyilār E
ṅkaḷai nirilum ve
yililum Iṭṭu
p pala vetiṉai
yuñ ceyyap pa
lave tiṉai kku pa
ṟṟātu nāṅkaḷuṅ
kāvaloṭum po
yt tañcāvūr Irā
jarāja mārāyariṭai
kkey cella mārā
yarum Atikārañcey
vāriṭaikke ceṉ
ṟu Ikkāṇi Aṭaivu
kuttip potukave
ṉṟu Ippaṭaiyā
roṭum tūtaroṭum
kāvaloṭum Atikā
rañ ceyvāriṭaik
key cellakkāṭṭa nā
ṅkaḷum Atikārañ ce
yvār marat toḻuki
le Irukkac cella Ati
kārañ ceyvarākaḷum
Uṅkaḷūr Avaṉ kā
ṇi Uḷḷatu kuṭiyo
ṭu kuṭipeṟum vilai
kku Aṭaikuttukave
ṉ ṟeva nāṅkaḷum E
ṅkaḷūr Avaṉuṭaiya
nirnilaṉum puṉcey
yumākap paḻampaṭi ni
laṉ Oṉṟey Iraṇṭu
mā Innilaṉ Oṉṟe
y Iraṇṭu māvum Utta
ma mattiyama Atamamāka
Aṭaivukuttiṉa kācu
6 10 2 Ikkācu Aṟupa
ttiraṇṭum Aṭaivu
ta ppatāka nā
ḷavatikoṇṭu Ippa
ṭaiyilār Iṭai
yoṭum pontu I
kkāṇi viṟṟu kkācu
vaiykkaveṉṟu
Ippaṭaiyilārum
Eṅkaḷai nirilum ve
yilum yiṭṭup pala ve
tiṉai ceyyap pala
vetiṉaikka māṟṟātu Ik
kācukkuk kāṇi vilaiko
ṇṭu ñāti sāman=tadha niya
kar muṉpa nilātu poka
Innilattileya Ira
ṇṭu māccey Oṟṟi U
ṭaiyaṉāy Āḷkin
ṟa māṭalaṉ mātavaṉ
Appirameyaṉeṉ Iv
viraṇṭu māviṉālum A
ṭaivu kuttiṉapaṭi nā
ṉey Iṉnilaṉ vilaiko
ṇṭu kācu vaiyapaṉe
ṉṉa niṅkiṉa nilam Ula
vum sabh Aiyomitāy
kiṭan=ta nilaṉ 4 vum Ā
ka nilaṉ Ula� nīkki nilaṉ
�4 Innilaṉmukkā
le nālūmā varaiyum vi
laikkuk koḷviri
laiyo veṉṟu muṟ
kūṟa Immoḻikeṭṭup
poṉmāḷikaittuñ
ciṉatevar teviyār
ceramāṉār makaḷār piṟān=ta
kaṉ teviyamaṉār vilai
kkuk koḷvaṉeṉṟu pi
ṟkūṟa muṟkūṟiya mahentra
maṅkalattu sabh Aiyo
m Ippirān=ta kaṉ teviya
maṉārkku viṟṟukkuṭutta ni
laṉ Ivvūr teṉ
viṉuṭaiya nilaṉ
palavāy paḻam
paṭi vāykūṟupuḷ
ḷiyāl van=ta nilaṉ
�4 Iṉnilaṉ
mukkāle nāṉmā
varaiyilum perumā
ṉvāyiṉ vaṭakarai ni
laṉ va Ulavum Itaṉ
melai nilaṉ �4 yu
māka nilaṉ �4 māvu
kkum kiḻpāṟ kellai ka
ruvāykkālukku veṟku
m teṉpāṟ kellai
perumāṉvāykku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟ kellai
tiraimū rellaiy va
rampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapā
ṟ kellai Ivvūr ti
ruppāṟkaṭaltevar ni
lattukkum tiruviṭai
marutil caṇḍeśvara
pperumāḷ nilattuk
kum tiraimū rellai va
rampukkut teṟkum Iṉ
ṉum perumāṉvāyin
teṉkarai nilaṉ �
kku kiḻpāṟ kellai
karuvāykkālukku me
ṟkum teṉpāṟ ke
llai tāmaṉvāykku
vaṭakkum melpāṟ ke
llai māṭalaṉ māta
vaṉ Appirameyaṉ ni
lattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟ kellai perumāṉa
vāykkut teṟkum Iṉ
ṉum tāmaṉvāyiṉiṉ
ṟum teṟkunokkip po
ṉa Uṭciṟuvāykkāliṉ
kiḻkarai nilavarampukku
m kiḻThis inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 5.723 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
